title: Raghav Chadha joins BJP: Anna Hazare reacts, Punjab Congress chief cautions AAP — ‘one day even 50 of your MLAs...’
description: Raghav Chadha joins BJP: Punjab's Congress chief urged AAP to remain cautious. He said, “I want to say that the Aam Aadmi Party should remain cautious. It should not happen that one day, even 50 of your MLAs switch sides.”
